programme.title: Ben and Charlie 1972
programme.desc: In Ben and Charlie, Giuliano Gemma and George Eastman team up in a Spaghetti Western full of action, humor, and mischief. Ben, a smooth-talking drifter, and Charlie, a hot-tempered brawler, form an unlikely partnership as they stumble from one scheme to another across the frontier. Chased by outlaws, double-crossed by swindlers, and forever at odds with each other, the two rogues turn trouble into adventure at every turn. With sharp banter, lively gunfights, and offbeat charm, this buddy Western proves that friendship can be as wild as the West itself.

programme.title: Bigfoot Country
programme.desc: SHORT (DIGITAL) - Some say Bigfoot is just a hoax, but when a group of hikers venture into the forest after being warned by locals, they soon realize they are not alone. Terrorized to the core, one accidentally shoots and wounds the creature who has no choice but to defend its domain.

programme.title: Hybrid World: The Plan to Modify and Control the Human Race
programme.desc: Behind closed doors scientists and corporations have breached genetic codes that separate the individuality of all animal and plant species on earth. Laboratories around the world are honing their skills while our humanity and dignity as a species is on the operating table like a universal Frankenstein, subject to a wholesale psychic and physiological re-design under the guise of progress. The proponents claim the field of "Transhumanism" will change the world by eliminating sickness and famine while at the same time, governments and military groups around the globe are having clandestine meetings to discuss super soldiers, super intelligence, and even super animals to maintain military dominance and control over the populations of the world. Even more horrifying they must create committees to implement plans to defend their nations against future terrorism performed by transhumans (modified human beings) with the universal understanding that no nation can afford NOT to engage in this apocalyptic future of genetically altered life. We are at war for the mind of a generation and the soul of the human race. Billions of dollars are at stake with corporations and powerful individuals looking toward a post human future world. If we care about our humanity, then the time is NOW to stand up and understand where science and technology are taking us and to do something about it. Our foods are already being genetically altered with devastating side effects which are now coming to light. Will we allow experiments with genetic engineering to excel to a horrifying level where they create an unthinkable race of non-human entities? What level of horrifying abominations have already been committed?

programme.title: Alien Overlords
programme.desc: SHORT - UFO's, Aliens, Men in Black, Government conspiracies and agendas. Like many people, Tom Keating thought that those things were the product of delusional minds until he met Spencer, an elite insider who reveals on his deathbed the horrifying truth to the Alien Agenda.

programme.title: Fast Zombies with Guns
programme.desc: Collateral Damage. Sometimes, it’s unavoidable. Mobster Kingpin Paul Varlo’s (Charles Ramsey) attempt to kill a potential rat by poisoning his personal water supply leads to something he never saw coming – an outbreak of zombie carnage! To make matters worse, these zombies are different; they’re faster, meaner and they’re armed…With the town being overrun by fast zombies with guns, one resilient band of people are left to attempt an escape to the nearest undead-free zone and survival.Meanwhile, Jake (Tony Swansey) and his girlfriend Laura (Leena Kurishingal) are cruising their way up to this sweet, little Midwestern town. One quick business transaction with the local mob boss, and they can continue on their way to some fun in the sun, as planned. However, what they discover is a deserted town … at first.Will the group survive the terror that has befallen them? Will Jake and Laura get their money?? Will the zombies run out of bullets??? The answers can be found in … Fast Zombies with Guns.

programme.title: Surviving Mann

Watch now to find out!

programme.title: Surviving Mann

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: If the previous day wasn’t physically challenging enough, Donn kicks off this episode with a mad dash for individual points. Next, the contestants and celebrity guests are tested with a unique course of fire. As an added treat, a Black-Hawk-Down pilot and war hero introduces the contestants to “The Glove”.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they've lost, and how they've charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there's rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Charleston
programme.desc: Jefferson Graham of Photowalks takes you to one of the richest and most populous colonies in the pre-Revolutionary War era: Charleston, South Carolina. Explore Charleston's layered history and scenic waterfront, along with its picturesque cobblestone streets.

programme.title: Route 66 Road Trip
programme.desc: Take a drive with Photowalks host Jefferson Graham along the famous Route 66. He'll give photo trips for an epic road trip.

programme.title: Get Out Of the House
programme.desc: Enjoy the great outdoors as tree swinging, leaf pile diving and hilarious belly flops make the World’s Funniest Videos countdown.

programme.title: Braving The Elements
programme.desc: Videos including a shed floating down the road, a snowball struggling to go uphill, waterskiing behind a tractor and trampolining during a hailstorm make the countdown.

programme.title: Be It Ever So Humble
programme.desc: These home videos feature a baby scared of a vacuum, a crew dropping a house from a crane, and a bear settling into a new home.

programme.title: Charleston
programme.desc: Jefferson Graham of Photowalks takes you to one of the richest and most populous colonies in the pre-Revolutionary War era: Charleston, South Carolina. Explore Charleston's layered history and scenic waterfront, along with its picturesque cobblestone streets.
